true.notes: Workshared identity joins include version number as discriminator-gated required context.

notes: Pilot for canonical evidence superset + selectors in the identity domain.
join_hash uses policy-required items only; optional items remain in identity_basis.items for future exploration.
File-local identifiers remain excluded from canonical identity evidence and join-key hashing.
Policy aligned to canonical identity evidence emitted by domains/phase_filters.py.
Join identity is defined by the four per-status presentation ids; phase_filter.name remains a phase2 coordination/label field only.
This replaces the provisional name-only policy, which no longer matched the exported identity_items surface.
Policy is provisional pending broader samples; current Pareto evidence shows zero fragmentation and zero collisions for both phase.name and phase.seq.
phase.name is treated as the definition-bearing identifier in current evidence; phase.seq may be added only if future datasets exhibit name collisions.
Accuracy moved to optional - display precision preference, not behavioral identity.
Spec + type + rounding define the unit system (feet-inches, metric, etc.).
Accuracy variance (0.01 vs 1.0) is display formatting, not calculation behavior.
DECISION: Accuracy affects display only, not technical behavior - treat as refinement.
Upgraded from v2 (segments_def_hash) to v3 (segments_norm_hash) for scale-invariant identity.
segments_norm_hash encodes segment kind sequence + length ratios (length / non_dot_total).
Scale variants of the same structural type collapse to the same pattern.
Dot segments use relative epsilon (1% of non_dot_total) to preserve scale invariance.
segments_def_hash moved to explicitly_excluded — retains exact identity in identity_basis for forensics.
Names are labels only and must not participate in joins.
lp.is_import added to coordination_items in extractor v2.
Identity is definition-based: projection weight + color + referenced line pattern definition via pattern_ref.sig_hash.
pattern_ref.kind is too coarse and produces high collisions; it must not be used for joins.

Arrow.notes: Arrow record class: arrow-specific geometry + fill/closed flags are applicable and required.

Heavy end tick mark.notes: Heavy end tick mark record class: centered and pen weight are applicable and required.

notes: Schema v2: record class routing corrected. Dot/Diagonal/Box/Loop/Elevation Target/Datum triangle are size-only (common items only).
Arrow record class: arrowhead.width_angle_deg, arrowhead.fill_tick, arrowhead.arrow_closed.
Heavy end tick mark record class: arrowhead.tick_mark_centered, arrowhead.heavy_end_pen_weight.
Size-only record classes (Dot/Diagonal/Box/Loop/Elevation Target/Datum triangle): common items only (arrowhead.style + arrowhead.tick_size_in).
Style-specific fields moved from optional_items to explicitly_excluded_items at common level — they are never unconditionally applicable.
Definition-based identity only; no referential identifiers in joins.
Policy: color_rgb is definition-bearing.
Policy: arrowhead is definition-bearing only via arrowheads-domain signature hash (text_type.leader_arrowhead_sig_hash), not uid/name/id.
If text_type.leader_arrowhead_sig_hash is unavailable for some records, treat as lower confidence rather than substituting uid/name.
Structured domain: join is performed on vf.def_hash only (definition bundle hash).
vf.def_hash is computed from canonical vf.categories + vf.logic_root + vf.rule_count + ordered vf.rule[###].sig, but those leaf inputs remain identity-only for forensics.
Names/labels and any UID-like identifiers are prohibited from joins for standards governance.
Structured-sequence domain: join identity is the ordered filter-stack definition collapsed into vfa.stack_def_hash.
Leaf stack members and counts are authoritative identity (identity_basis) but must not participate in joins.
Template identifiers are labels/linkage only and are prohibited from joins.
Join-key identity captures the override pattern, not where it's used.
vco.baseline_category_path identifies WHICH category is being overridden.
vco.baseline_sig_hash identifies the object_styles baseline definition being overridden.
vco.override_properties_hash collapses all delta properties into a single behavioral signature.
Individual delta properties (line_weight, color, etc.) are forensic detail, excluded from joins.
Deprecated aggregate domain. Use view_category_overrides_model and view_category_overrides_annotation.
Domain family: view_category_overrides.
Contains: CategoryType.Model categories and subcategories.
include_controlled removed — include state sourced from view_templates.include_vg_model.
vco.vg_tab = Model in coordination_items for downstream join.
Domain family: view_category_overrides.
Contains: CategoryType.Annotation categories.
Cut weight not applicable to annotation categories — excluded.
include_controlled removed — include state sourced from view_templates.include_vg_annotation.
vco.vg_tab = Annotation in coordination_items for downstream join.
Baseline: object_styles_annotation ctx map.
Domain family: dimension_types.
Contains: Linear, LinearFixed, Angular, ArcLength shapes (all share witness_line_control).
No record class gating needed — homogeneous property structure across all four shapes.
witness_line_control is confirmed active for all four shapes in UI.
Domain family: dimension_types.
Contains: Angular only.
UI exposes Angular Dimension Style as a distinct system family.
Witness Line Control is active for Angular — required, not optional.
No record class gating needed.
Domain family: dimension_types.
Contains: Radial only.
Radius Symbol Location and Radius Symbol Text are active fields in UI.
No record class gating needed.
Domain family: dimension_types.
Contains: Diameter, DiameterLinked.
Diameter Symbol Location and Diameter Symbol Text are active fields in UI.
No record class gating needed.
Domain family: dimension_types.
Contains: SpotElevation, SpotElevationFixed.
Primary units shows indicator fields, no prefix/suffix, no witness line.
Leader Arrowhead replaces Tick Mark for spot types.
No record class gating needed.
Domain family: dimension_types.
Contains: SpotCoordinate only.
Entirely different primary units — coordinate indicator fields.
No record class gating needed.
Domain family: dimension_types.
Contains: SpotSlope only.
Minimal — Slope Direction and Leader Line Length active, no symbol field.
Rotate with Component is greyed (not applicable) — not extracted.
No record class gating needed.
Domain family: object_styles.
Contains: CategoryType.Model categories and subcategories.
Cut weight and material are applicable to Model categories.
pattern_ref gate removed — pattern_ref.sig_hash is optional (present for ref patterns, q=missing for solid/none).
pattern_ref.kind NOT in identity_items — only needed for the old gate which is removed.
row_key encodes category path and provides primary identity.
Domain family: object_styles.
Contains: CategoryType.Annotation categories.
Cut weight and material do not exist for Annotation categories in Revit API.
These fields must not be emitted in identity_items for this domain.
Domain family: object_styles.
Contains: CategoryType.AnalyticalModel categories.
Same structure as annotation: cut weight and material not applicable.
Domain family: object_styles.
Contains: CategoryType.Imported categories (CAD import artifacts).
Material present but is CAD render material, not governed Revit material — excluded from identity.
Domain family: fill_patterns.
Contains: FillPatternTarget.Drafting (target_id = 0), excluding solid fills.
Solid fills are system defaults, ungoverned — excluded from this domain.
grids_def_hash is the hash of the ordered grid definitions.
Domain family: fill_patterns.
Contains: FillPatternTarget.Model (target_id = 1), excluding solid fills.
Solid fills excluded — system defaults, ungoverned.
Domain family: materials.
identity_basis is minimal and identity-only (material.uid).
v1 sig_hash is computed from graphics payload fields in domains/materials.py.
Identity tab fields and graphics payload are captured as record content (not identity_items).
use_render_appearance is recorded for diagnostics/context but excluded from default signature.
Appearance/Physical/Thermal assets are explicitly deferred in v1.
Split domain: same join key policy as monolithic view_templates.
view_template.def_hash captures complete behavioral definition.
Domain family routing is handled by coordination_items.vt.view_type_family, not by the join key.
Contains: ViewType.FloorPlan, ViewType.EngineeringPlan (Structural), ViewType.AreaPlan.
Split domain: same join key policy as monolithic view_templates.
view_template.def_hash captures complete behavioral definition.
Domain family routing is handled by coordination_items.vt.view_type_family, not by the join key.
Contains: ViewType.CeilingPlan.
Split domain: same join key policy as monolithic view_templates.
view_template.def_hash captures complete behavioral definition.
Domain family routing is handled by coordination_items.vt.view_type_family, not by the join key.
Contains: ViewType.Elevation, ViewType.Section, ViewType.Detail.
Split domain: same join key policy as monolithic view_templates.
view_template.def_hash captures complete behavioral definition.
Domain family routing is handled by coordination_items.vt.view_type_family, not by the join key.
Contains: ViewType.ThreeD, ViewType.Rendering, ViewType.DraftingView.
Split domain: same join key policy as monolithic view_templates.
view_template.def_hash captures complete behavioral definition.
Domain family routing is handled by coordination_items.vt.view_type_family, not by the join key.
Contains: ViewType.Schedule, ViewType.PanelSchedule.
Domain family: compound_types.
stack_hash_loose is both sig_hash input and primary join discriminator.
stack_hash_strict and stack_hash_function_only are coordination items for pareto evaluation.
Wrapping params are optional — degrade gracefully if unreadable.
wt.type_name excluded per D-001 — names are labels only.
Domain family: compound_types.
stack_hash_loose includes deck_usage for structural deck layers.
Domain family: compound_types.
Basic Roof only — non-basic types blocked.
Domain family: compound_types.
Compound Ceiling only — non-compound types blocked.
